_description: Quarterly rebuild entries for GTM path. Append only — one entry per quarter (every ~90 days). sections_run lists which step-filtered sections were active. top_decisions and next_quarter_priorities are the strategic outputs. follow_up_sessions lists scheduled adjustment-files (icp-adjustment.md / messaging-adjustment.md / playbook-update.md) for upcoming separate sessions.

note: Example row — delete on first real quarterly.
